mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMP_INFO ( COMPANY_NUMBER, COMP_CEO_NAME, COMP_FND_YEAR, COMP_EMPL_CNT, COMP_REV, COMP_CAP, COMP_TYPE, COMP_SUMMARY, COMP_TECH, COMP_MAIN_BIZ, COMP_INFO, COMP_SVC_HIST, COMP_PAGE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{companyNumber}, #{compCeoName}, #{compFndYear}, #{compEmplCnt}, #{compRev}, #{compCap}, #{compType}, #{compSummary}, #{compTech}, #{compMainBiz}, #{compInfo}, #{compSvcHist}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, C.COMPANY_BRN AS companyBrn, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME AS compCeoName, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR AS compFndYear, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT AS compEmplCnt, CI.COMP_REV AS compRev, CI.COMP_CAP AS compCap, CI.COMP_TYPE AS compType, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, CI.COMP_TECH AS compTech, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ AS compMainBiz, CI.COMP_INFO AS compInfo, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST AS compSvcHist, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE AS jobPostProfile, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT AS jobPostContent, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS AS jobPostProcess, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD AS jobPostMethod, TO_CHAR(JP.JOB_POST_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS jobPostDate, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat1IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat2IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat3IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat4IsHiring FROM TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON CM.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, MIN(FILE_NUMBER) AS FILE_NUMBER FROM TBL_FILE GROUP BY COMPANY_NUMBER ) FM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = FM.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON FM.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE CM.USER_NUMBER = #{value} AND CM.COMPANY_MANAGER_STATE = 'ACTIVE'
